raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ja weens Wihrs fawa
Brahta Seewu nemm/ ta irr
weena beſtkanniga Leeta/ tas irr
fawa Brahta Kaununu atfedſis/
teem buhs bes Behrneem buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Turrajt tad wiﬀas man-
nus Likkumus/ un wiﬀas man-
nas Teefas/un darrajt pehz teem/
ka ta Semne/ kurp es juhs wed-
du/ juhs ne iſwenij/ kad juhs
eekſch tahs eſihwojat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ne stajgajt eekſch to
Paganu Likkumeem/ ko es juhſu
Preekſchaâ iſdſihſchu/ jo wiﬀas
ſchahs Leetas irr tee darriſchi/
tapehz eſinu es winnu apniz-
zis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es eſinu jums fazzijſ/
juhs buhs winnu Semni ee-
mantaht/ un es dohfchn jums to/
ka juhs to eemantojat/ weenu
Semni/ kas ar Peenu un Med-
du tekk/ Es eſinu tas KUNGS
juhſu Deews/ kas es juhs no teem
Paganeeem atſchkihris eſinu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz buhs jums no-
ſchkirt ſchêthſtus Lohpus no ne-
ſchkihſteem/ un neſchkihſtus Put-
nus no ſchkihſteem: Un jums ne
buhs juhsas Dwehſeles fagahniht
pee Lohpeem/ un pee Putneem/
un pee wiﬀa/ kas wirs Semunes
leen/ no ka Es juhs eſinu no-
ſchkihris/ un jums buhs to par
neſchkihſtu turreht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un jums buhs man fweh-
teein buht/ jo Es tas KUNGS
eſinu ſwehts/ un eſinu juhs no
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu fahds Wihrs jeb
Seewa Sihſneeks/ jeb Paredſe-
tajs irr/ teem buhs nokanteein
tapt/ tee ar Akmiſceem janomeh-
ta/ laid winnu Affins us teem
paleek.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Deewa Likkumi preekſch teem Preesteveem:
Mo winnu Meſcheiſtibaß: 2. Ka teem n
buhs ſawas Meeſas pahrwehrtiht: 5. M
kahdu Manfu/ jeb apſmeetu/ jeb atſahdina
tu par Seewu nemt: 7. Weena Preester
Meitu/ kad ta Manzibu dſenn/ buhs jad
dſnaht: 9. Tam Augſtam-Preesteram
buhs pee jeckahdu Mirrozu nahkt:
Weenu Jumpraivu par Seewu nemt: 1
Taß/ kam pee ſawas Meeſas kahda Wai
irr/ ne warr par Preesteri tapt: 16.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ehz to fazzija tas KUNG
Bus Mohsu: Runna u
Teemi Preestereem Aär
na Dehſeem/ un fakfi us teem
pahr weenu Mittonu ( weena
Preesteram ) ne buhs neſchkihſ
darritees ſtarp ſaweem ſandim
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka ween pahr ſawu Affin
Raddu/ kas winnam Tuw
Rads/ pahr winna Mahti/
pahr winna Tehwu / un po
winna Dehſu/ un pahr win
Meitu/un pahr winna Brahl
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pahr winna Mahf
kas wehl Jumprava/ un w
nam ihſtena irr/ kas pee Wi
wehl ne irr/ pahr to tas w
neſchkihſtu-darritees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tam ne buhs pahr fat
Wirſneeku ſtarp farveem Lau
neſchkihſtu darritees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teem ne buhs us fa
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
